_note: Storage lab. CRC has ONLY a default hostpath StorageClass (RWO, WaitForFirstConsumer) and NO dcs-file/dcs-block classes. The workshop's File PVC is ReadWriteMany, which hostpath cannot provision — so the File flow is EXPECTED TO FAIL on CRC. run-steps set DCS_SC_FILE to the CRC default so envsubst produces a valid (if RWO-only) class name; verify-storageclass then passes, but pvc-bound for the RWX claim will not. Full green needs the real DCS storage classes.

steps.run: DCS_SC_FILE=crc-csi-hostpath-provisioner envsubst < pvc-file.yaml | oc apply -f - && envsubst < hello-dcs-with-volume.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=120s || true
oc exec deployment/hello-dcs -- sh -c 'echo persisted-by-dcs > /data/marker' || true
